results.title: Mortgage broker shares little known route onto property ladder for renters
results.description: Renters who can demonstrate a track record of paying rent on time may have more options for getting a mortgage.

results.title: Tanzanian Authorities Close Investigation Into Death of Influencer Ashlee Jenae, Rule Suicide
results.description: Authorities in Tanzania have concluded that American social media influencer Ashlee Jenae, also known as Ashly Robinson, died by suicide following what they described as a period of severe mental distress.

results.title: How to watch the new 'Dutton Ranch' episode 5 for free tonight
results.description: The Yellowstone spinoff continues with Beth's pivotal deal proposal in tonight's chapter of the show, streaming free when you sign up for Philo or Paramount Plus.

results.title: Bondi hero breaks silence on Instagram
Harry and Meghan 'may need to downsize' from $14m Montecito home amid increasing pressures
results.description: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle have lived in their $14 million Montecito mansion in California since quitting the UK in 2020.
